---
title: "Vegetation Data Ingestion"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  input_file: "data-raw/vegetation_field_forms.xlsx"
  project_id: "PROJECT_ID"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(here)
```

## Purpose

Read raw vegetation field form data from Excel into a tidy R data frame.
This Rmd is the entry point for all vegetation analysis — output feeds into `02_qaqc.Rmd`.

## Load field data

```{r load}
veg_raw <- readxl::read_excel(
  here(params$input_file),
  sheet = "Vegetation"
)

glimpse(veg_raw)
```

## Standardise column names

```{r rename}
# TODO: map Excel header names to standard snake_case field names
# e.g. rename("species_code" = "Sp. Code", "cover_pct" = "Cover %", ...)
veg <- veg_raw |>
  janitor::clean_names()
```

## Confirm plot inventory

```{r plot-summary}
veg |>
  distinct(plot_id) |>
  arrange(plot_id)
```

## Save interim output

```{r save}
saveRDS(veg, here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_veg_ingested.rds")))
message("Saved: ", nrow(veg), " rows across ", n_distinct(veg$plot_id), " plots.")
```
